return(function(...)local end,function(f)local M,z=487792-487791,f[-503344+503345]while z do b[z],M=b[z]-(569714+-569713),(743607+-743606)+M if-37473+37473==b[z]then b[z],K[z]=nil,nil end z=f[M]end
